title: festuca stricta var. multinervis
intro: Festuca stricta var. multinervis, also known as the tall fescue or glaucous fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Festuca stricta var. multinervis include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
